summary: GLS Envios and Tracking URL endpoints tested successfully. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend /crm/logistica page verified working with 6 shipments displayed, tracking links visible. Backend APIs return correct structure with tracking_url field.

minor.issue: 1 legacy shipment (d7d2c390-fa02-4906-a9f9-fb378f044bdf) has gls_codbarras but tracking_url is null - likely created before tracking_url feature was added

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing shipments in gls_shipments collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GLS tracking URL feature verified working. Backend endpoints: GET /api/gls/envios returns list with total, data, tracking_url. GET /api/ordenes/{id}/logistics returns gls_activo=true and shipment data with tracking_url. Frontend /crm/logistica shows 6 shipments with tracking links. One legacy shipment missing tracking_url (data migration issue, not code bug).

tests: Returns list with total, data, page, limit fields
Shipments with codbarras have tracking_url pointing to gls-spain.es
Returns correct structure with gls_activo, recogida, envio blocks
gls_activo is true when GLS is configured
Envio shipment has tracking_url with correct format
